pre_game.message: Hey, I’m A. It’s a bit restless in here with everyone waiting, isn't it? I’m mostly just trying to keep my head on straight before things kick off—how are you feeling about the game?
Hey A, I'm D. It definitely is. I’m feeling pretty focused, honestly—really hoping to take home some of that prize money for my family. How about you?
Same here. I’m doing this for the people I care about, so I’m pretty determined to walk away with something.
I respect that. It definitely adds a lot of pressure when you're doing it for others, doesn't it?
It really does, but I think it helps keep me focused. How are you handling it? You seem pretty calm so far.
I’m trying to stay that way. I figure being level-headed is the best strategy to make sure I don't mess this up for the people counting on me.
That makes a lot of sense. Staying steady is probably the best way to make sure we actually get what we came here for.
Exactly. If you don't mind me asking, what would winning this mean for your family?
It would mean everything—just having that extra security and knowing they’re taken care of would be a huge weight off my shoulders.
I completely understand that feeling. It's a heavy burden, but it's what keeps us going. I'm going to go talk to some other people before things start, but I wish you the best of luck.
Thanks, D. I really appreciate that. Best of luck to you too—I hope everything works out for your family.

post_game.message: Great job! I'm glad we all stuck to the $10,000 fair share.
I'm really glad we all stuck to the fair share of $10,000. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I agree, it’s a fantastic outcome. It was a pleasure working with everyone!
